top_items.title: Anthropic says Claude can now use your computer to finish tasks for you in AI agent push - CNBC
top_items.one_liner: Anthropic's Claude can now control user computers to finish tasks, marking a significant advance in AI agent capabilities.

top_items.title: Kubernetes as AI Infrastructure: Google Cloud, llm-d, and the CNCF
top_items.one_liner: GCP's strategy uses Kubernetes for AI infrastructure, supporting LLM builders and agentic futures.

top_items.title: The open platform for the AI era: GKE, agents, and OSS innovation at KubeCon EU 2026
